DDL.statement: ALTER TABLE `APP_QM_PANEL_TRAY` ADD COLUMN `TRAY_SEQUENCE` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 AFTER `CREATED`;

UPDATE APP_QM_PANEL_TRAY t JOIN ( SELECT PANEL_ID, TRAY_ID, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY PANEL_ID ORDER BY TRAY_ID) AS rn FROM APP_QM_PANEL_TRAY ) x ON x.PANEL_ID = t.PANEL_ID AND x.TRAY_ID = t.TRAY_ID SET t.TRAY_SEQUENCE = x.rn;
ALTER TABLE `APP_QM_PANEL_TRAY_SAMPLES` ADD INDEX `SAMPLE_NDX`(`SAMPLE_ID`) USING BTREE;

CREATE VIEW `view_qm_panel_tray_samples` as SELECT `APP_QM_PANEL_TRAY`.`PANEL_ID`, `APP_QM_PANEL_TRAY`.`TRAY_SEQUENCE`, `APP_QM_PANEL_TRAY_SAMPLES`.`TRAY_ID`, `APP_QM_PANEL_TRAY_SAMPLES`.`SAMPLE_ID`, `APP_QM_PANEL_TRAY_SAMPLES`.`SEQUENCE_ID` FROM `APP_QM_PANEL_TRAY_SAMPLES` INNER JOIN APP_QM_PANEL_TRAY ON `APP_QM_PANEL_TRAY`.`TRAY_ID` = `APP_QM_PANEL_TRAY_SAMPLES`.`TRAY_ID`
